data.content:
All 4 tests passed and a TRX report was generated at:

```
bin/Debug/net10.0/TestResults/_runnervmg397c_2026-05-28_12_56_57.8779714.trx
```

To make this work I had to:
1. Add `<EnableMSTestRunner>true</EnableMSTestRunner>`, `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>`, `<TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>`, and `<IsTestingPlatformApplication>true</IsTestingPlatformApplication>` to the project (required by the MTP runner specified in `global.json`)
2. Upgrade MSTest to 3.11.1 (to fix a protocol version incompatibility with .NET 10 SDK)
3. Add the `Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport` package
4. Run with `dotnet test -- --report-trx`
